sections.classes: grid grid-cols-12 grid-rows-12 text-white fixed top-0
w-full h-[calc(100dvh+2px)] text-white flex pb-8 tablet:!pb-12
sections.innerText:
Analytics for
VISIBILITY
IN AI SEARCH

People don’t search for information the way they used to. They ask questions, and AI answers. Solais shows how your brand appears within those answers, and how that visibility shifts over time. It’s clarity for a new kind of discovery.

sections.classes: flex flex-col tablet:flex-row gap-4 tablet:gap-24 w-full
sections.innerText:
Analytics for
VISIBILITY
IN AI SEARCH

People don’t search for information the way they used to. They ask questions, and AI answers. Solais shows how your brand appears within those answers, and how that visibility shifts over time. It’s clarity for a new kind of discovery.

sections.classes: about-div flex flex-col gap-4 w-full max-w-[550px]
sections.innerText:
How it Works
Discovering
Your Voice

Rather than guessing at what influences visibility, you get a structured approach: define what matters, track how it changes, and act on what the data reveals.

sections.classes: about-div flex flex-col gap-3 w-full max-mini:p-4
sections.innerText:
01
Strategising
Set Your Prompts

Define the questions people ask when they’re trying to learn, compare or decide. These might include category research, brand comparisons or product recommendations relevant to your market.

sections.classes: about-div flex flex-col gap-3 w-full max-mini:p-4
sections.innerText:
02
Analysing
Track Responses

Solais runs these prompts repeatedly, capturing how responses evolve over time. See if and when you appear, how early you’re mentioned and how you’re framed alongside competing brands.

sections.classes: about-div flex flex-col gap-2 w-full max-mini:p-4
sections.innerText:
03
Optimising
Act With Confidence

Solais surfaces patterns across responses to show which sources influence visibility and where changes to content, PR, directory, socials or overall online presence can improve outcomes.
